metadata.description: Claude Code and Codex skills for TikTok growth: first 1-3 second hook scripting, caption writing with TikTok settings and hashtags, trend and sound mapping, an AI-script humanizer with bundled pre-film audit, and weekly content planning around completion rate. The rendered video publishes through the Publora API.

plugins.name: tiktok-skills
plugins.description: Bundle of 5 TikTok marketing skills for Claude Code and Codex with 3-second hook formulas, spoken-script hook writing, caption and platform-settings writing, trend and sound mapping, a unified humanizer (rewrite plus `--mode audit` pre-film check), and a weekly content planner. The user supplies the video; the rendered clip ships via Publora's draft, upload, schedule flow.
